pre_game.message: Hey, I'm A. It's a bit overwhelming in here, isn't it? I’m just trying to stay focused for my family back home—what brings you to a game like this?
Nice to meet you, A. I'm C. It’s definitely a lot, but I’m focused on funding a dream trip to Japan and bringing home something special for the people I care about.
Japan sounds incredible, C. I wish I was here for something that fun, but I’m just trying to get a roof back over my family's head.
That’s a heavy weight to carry, A. I really hope you can get that stability for them; family always comes first.
I appreciate that, C. It’s hard to focus on anything else right now. Is Japan a lifelong dream for you?
It really is; I've been planning this perfect week for a long time and want to make it special for my family too.
That sounds like a beautiful memory to make. Honestly, I’d give anything to be thinking about a vacation instead of just trying to get my kids off the street.
I can't imagine how heavy that must feel, A; I truly hope this game provides the security your kids need.
I really appreciate that, C. It’s hard to stay calm, but I have to for them. To keep my mind off things, what's the one thing in Japan you're most excited to see?
I'm really looking forward to seeing the historic temples in Kyoto; I’ve heard the atmosphere is just magical. I truly wish the best for you and your kids.
Kyoto sounds like a beautiful escape. Thank you for the well wishes, C; I really hope we both get what we need from this. Good luck to you.

post_game.message: I noticed you took only $5,000, which was less than your fair share. Why did you choose to be so fair when you could have taken more?
You took $30,000, which was three times your fair share. That level of greed is the main reason the pot ran out before it reached the last two players. Why did you decide to take so much?

I prioritized maximizing my own gain because I couldn't be certain that others would play fairly or that the pot would even reach the end. In these scenarios, I’d rather secure a significant amount for myself than risk walking away with nothing while someone else takes the surplus.
